narrative:
Troy Twp township has 5,166 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
